dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE & ADMINISTRATION 2.1 General Administration Parenteral drug products should be inspected visually for particulate matter and discoloration prior to administration, whenever solution and container permit. Do not administer unless solution is clear and seal is intact. Each vial is intended for single dose only. Discard unused portion. For Intravenous administration. Titrate based on heart rate, PR interval, blood pressure and symptoms. 2.2 Adult Dosage 2.3 Pediatric Dosage Dosing in pedia
